calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior

Kenneth A. Lipson, Atty. for Petitioner: Zhanna Moskal, present as Guardian at litem for: Vitalyia Moskal, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $650.00
Costs $425.98
A net balance of $1,524.02. Per plaintiff's request, disposition of proceeds to be paid to minor's parent, no withdrawals until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
